## Summary

What capability should Remux gain?

## Scope Bucket

- [ ] v1 must ship
- [ ] v1.5 optional
- [ ] research / future

## Surfaces

- [ ] Live
- [ ] Control

## User Outcome

What becomes possible or easier after this lands?

## Acceptance

How will we know the work is done?

## Risks / Dependencies

What could block or complicate this?
